wine_bars.name: Weinstube Spitzhaeuschen
wine_bars.wine_program: Estate Weinstube of Weingut Schmitz pouring over 50 Mosel Rieslings and reds in the oldest half-timbered house on the Middle Mosel; by-the-glass and bottle
wine_bars.description: Wine tavern inside a leaning 1416 half-timbered landmark off the Marktplatz, run as a Weinstube by the Schmitz-Herges family since 1970. Over 50 regional Rieslings and reds in cramped, characterful rooms.

wine_bars.name: Tresor Wine & Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: Selected Mosel wines by the glass alongside a cocktail list, served on the Gestade promenade in a vault-themed room
wine_bars.description: Contemporary wine and cocktail bar on the Bernkastel river promenade, pairing a curated Mosel by-the-glass list with mixed drinks in an unusual safe-vault ambience.

wine_bars.name: Weinsinnig
wine_bars.wine_program: Region-in-the-bottle list of local Mosel wines from young, innovative vintners, served alongside flammkuchen near the cathedral
wine_bars.description: Central Trier wine bar focused on regional Mosel growers, especially young, experimental vintners. A relaxed by-the-glass programme with flammkuchen, steps from the Dom St. Peter.

wine_bars.name: Weinstube Kesselstatt
wine_bars.wine_program: Estate Gutsausschank of Weingut Reichsgraf von Kesselstatt, pouring the house Mosel, Saar and Ruwer Rieslings by the glass in cellars beneath Palais Kesselstatt
wine_bars.description: Wine tavern of the 675-year-old Kesselstatt estate beside Trier's Dom and Liebfrauen cathedral. Historic vaulted rooms and a garden terrace pour the estate's Mosel and Saar Rieslings.

wine_bars.name: Weingut und Weinstube Deutschherrenhof
wine_bars.wine_program: Estate wine tavern pouring the house Olewig and Trier Rieslings and Pinots by the glass, with winegrower-led tastings and cellar visits
wine_bars.description: Family estate Weinstube in Trier-Olewig, three kilometres from the centre, pouring its own Mosel wines by the glass and offering grower-commented tastings along a wine education path.

wine_bars.name: Doctor Weinstube
wine_bars.wine_program: Wine-tavern list led by Bernkasteler Riesling, including wines from the famed Doctor and Doctorberg sites, served by the glass and in tasting flights
wine_bars.description: Wine tavern in a 1668 former tithe house at the foot of the Bernkasteler Doctor vineyard, expanded into a Weinstube in 1830. Mosel Rieslings by the glass with regional plates and tasting menus.

wine_bars.name: Weinwirtschaft Friedrich-Wilhelm
wine_bars.wine_program: Wine bar and Kost-Bar wine shop with tastings and a large list led by local estates including the Bischoefliche Weingueter and the Friedrich-Wilhelm-Gymnasium estate
wine_bars.description: Wine bar and shop in central Trier with one of the city's prettiest terraces, pouring a large Mosel-led list from local estates alongside regional and Mediterranean tapas.

wine_bars.name: dieMOSEL Winebar
wine_bars.wine_program: Mosel-focused wine bar in a slate cellar with a rotating by-the-glass list and a small soulfood kitchen
wine_bars.description: Wine bar attached to the dieMOSEL Vinothek in art-nouveau Traben-Trarbach, set in an 1890 merchant villa cellar. Mosel pours by the glass with a relaxed soulfood menu.
